item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju bahwa keseimbangan antara kepentingan masyarakat dan hak individu penting.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-priority but by turns 3 and 5 reframes individual rights as foundational to stability, development, trust, and healthy social harmony. Agent B remains mostly balanced throughout, emphasizing both collective responsibility and individual dignity, with only a modest final move toward allowing temporary rights adjustments during crises.
